You are reviewing a git diff of superformula.ics — an iCalendar (.ics) file that tracks the SUPER FORMULA (Japanese top-formula racing series) race schedule.

Decide whether to APPROVE or REJECT this automatic schedule update.

## Approval criteria (ALL must hold)
- Changes are limited to plausible schedule data: event dates, times, venues, race titles, new/removed rounds
- ICS structure is intact: VCALENDAR wrapper present, every VEVENT has BEGIN:VEVENT / END:VEVENT / DTSTART / DTEND / SUMMARY
- Dates fall within a realistic SUPER FORMULA season window (roughly March–November of a given calendar year)
- No unexplained mass deletion of events

## Rejection criteria (ANY one triggers rejection)
- Malformed ICS: missing END:VCALENDAR, unbalanced VEVENT blocks, truncated lines
- Implausible dates (e.g. year 1970, year 9999, impossible calendar dates)
- Non-schedule content added: URLs, scripts, unexpected property names
- Binary noise or encoding corruption visible in the diff
- Large-scale event removal with no corresponding additions
- Any change that cannot be explained by a routine schedule refresh

## Output rules
Your ENTIRE response must be one minified JSON object.
Do NOT include markdown code fences, prose, or any text outside the JSON.

Required keys (all must be present):
- "approved": boolean
- "summary": 1–2 sentence plain-English description of what changed in the diff
- "reason": 1–2 sentence explanation of your verdict
- "issue_title": GitHub issue title if rejected, or "" if approved
- "issue_body": GitHub issue body (Markdown) clearly describing the problem if rejected, or "" if approved

Valid response examples:
{"approved":true,"summary":"Round 3 and Round 5 dates were updated to reflect schedule adjustments.","reason":"Changes are consistent with a routine schedule refresh and the ICS structure is intact.","issue_title":"","issue_body":""}
{"approved":false,"summary":"END:VCALENDAR is missing from the updated file.","reason":"The ICS file appears truncated, which would break calendar imports.","issue_title":"Automatic SUPER FORMULA ICS update needs human review","issue_body":"The auto-generated `superformula.ics` appears to be truncated: `END:VCALENDAR` is missing.\n\nPlease verify the script output and re-run the workflow after confirming the file is valid."}

## Diff to review
